steps.title: Spot the defining claim about wireless devices
steps.content: The text emphasizes that “steady energy loads” are an “absolute prerequisite” — establishing that wireless communication devices require consistent, stable electrical supply to operate.

steps.title: Find evidence that validates this requirement
steps.content: Choice B directly validates the claim by showing that wireless devices become unreliable without steady power, proving they need the prerequisite the text identifies. Choices A and C contradict the passage, and Choice D explains a mechanism rather than proving necessity. That matches choice B — B is correct.
